ab: bawki, mai ti tu Raq ta, Rasa ka!
ch: W:bawki，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: bawki, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: yau pama ussiq ta sammayan, Raypa ti meRasa!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧！
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: ussiq ma mai semin, Rasa ka tu uzusa!
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: Rasa pa iku tu Raq, yau baliwan numi?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎？
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: yau! utani ngidan su?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: ngid iku Rasa tu uzusa peRaskuan Raq seRay satabuan beRas.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: tazian ya beRas, yau pama niana ngidan su?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎？
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: Rasa pa iku tu tiRuR, yau pama?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: mai ti tiRuR niaq.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: Rasa pa iku tu qudus.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: naquni ay ngidan su?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: ngid iku Rasa tu kezut tusungan ay qudus.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: tebaRi ay zau, naquni zin su?
en: How about this red one?

ab: yau zuma ay tamak?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: yau pama busaR ay seRay deddan puli ay.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: bula iku tu ussiq deddan puli ay qudus.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: bawki, matiw isu seni? matiw isu mundu?
ch: W:bawki你剛剛去哪裡了？你去運動嗎？
en: bawki, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: ussa, manmu iku tu bai meRasa tu tenned.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: nazau si, anqaRabi yau lawad su? qasulun pa ita qan saRabi.
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空？要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: Rayngu iku, Rasa pa iku tu qudus.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: qasulun aka aisu qatiw.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: nengi isu, saputen tenned zau, utani asa na?
ch: M:你好，請問這把菜多少錢？
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: saputen tenned, uzusa betin asa na.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: utani asa na qawpiR zau?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: salaluyan qawpiR, utulu betin asa na.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: bula iku tu uzusa putenan tenned zau seRay salaluyan qawpiR.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
